title: Halloween GUI & HUD
description: Halloween pack: you can download full GUI or just only HUD!
body:
![logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d5a9f1d4d26ed5db507179298b207f2c9f4b83f1.png) *** ### **Separated HUD and GUI downloads are available in the files!** ⌖⋅◦ ♰ ◦⋅⌖⋅◦ 🕸️ ◦⋅⌖⋅◦ ♰ ◦⋅⌖
Your game have been cursed! Every inventory, every menu is now tainted with otherworldly textures, secret runes and a palette of fire-orange and spectral purple. This is a full GUI replacement pack designed to immerse you into a festive and haunting experience, perfect for the season! Trick or Treat!
⌖⋅◦ ♰ ◦⋅⌖⋅◦ 🕸️ ◦⋅⌖⋅◦ ♰ ◦⋅⌖ ### GUI Features:
✦ Full GUI retextured in thematic way. Mostly dark-lilac or blue colors
Some interfaces have special spooky elements
### HUD changes: ✦ Health - purple heart (normal) \ heart tinted like a vanilla effect (wither, poison, etc.)
✦ Armor — fall leaf
✦ Hunger — slice of pumpkin pie
✦ Mount Health — candles
✦ XP Bar — orange colored
✦ Hotbar — dark-lilac velvet with a gotic frame and decorations
✦ Slot Selection — pumpkin frame
*** ### **Support & Contact:** You can send me a tip on [Boosty](https://boosty.to/reterica)!
For any questions or suggestions, reach me out via my [Discord](https://discord.gg/QsezmMbPQF)
*** ⌖⋅◦ ♰ ◦⋅⌖⋅◦ 🕸️ ◦⋅⌖⋅◦ ♰ ◦⋅⌖
